basicTranslations.name: Basic Translations
basicTranslations.description: Translate single codons to their corresponding amino acids.

multipleCodons.name: Multiple Codons
multipleCodons.description: Translate RNA sequences containing multiple codons.

stopCodonBehavior.name: Stop Codon Behavior
stopCodonBehavior.description: Handle STOP codons correctly - translation should stop when a STOP codon is encountered.

emptyRnaSequence.name: Empty RNA sequence
emptyRnaSequence.description: An empty RNA sequence should result in an empty protein list.

methionineSequence.name: Methionine RNA sequence
methionineSequence.description: The RNA sequence 'AUG' should translate to 'Methionine'.

phenylalanineSequence1.name: Phenylalanine RNA sequence 1
phenylalanineSequence1.description: The RNA sequence 'UUU' should translate to 'Phenylalanine'.

phenylalanineSequence2.name: Phenylalanine RNA sequence 2
phenylalanineSequence2.description: The RNA sequence 'UUC' should translate to 'Phenylalanine'.

leucineSequence1.name: Leucine RNA sequence 1
leucineSequence1.description: The RNA sequence 'UUA' should translate to 'Leucine'.

leucineSequence2.name: Leucine RNA sequence 2
leucineSequence2.description: The RNA sequence 'UUG' should translate to 'Leucine'.

sequenceTwoProteins.name: Sequence of two protein codons
sequenceTwoProteins.description: The RNA sequence 'UUUUUU' should translate to ['Phenylalanine', 'Phenylalanine'].

sequenceDifferentCodons.name: Sequence of two different protein codons
sequenceDifferentCodons.description: The RNA sequence 'UUAUUG' should translate to ['Leucine', 'Leucine'].

sequenceThreeProteins.name: Sequence of three proteins
sequenceThreeProteins.description: The RNA sequence 'AUGUUUUGG' should translate to ['Methionine', 'Phenylalanine', 'Tryptophan'].

stopCodonAtStart.name: Stop codon at start
stopCodonAtStart.description: Translation should stop if a stop codon is at the beginning of the sequence.

stopCodonAtEnd.name: Stop codon at end
stopCodonAtEnd.description: Translation should stop if a stop codon is at the end of the sequence.

stopCodonInMiddle.name: Stop codon in middle
stopCodonInMiddle.description: Translation should stop if a stop codon is in the middle of the sequence.

breakDown.question: How do I break this down?
breakDown.answer: Two independent steps. First, split the RNA string into codons (groups of 3 characters). Second, translate each codon into the matching amino acid. Solving them separately is much easier than mixing them.

lookup.question: How should I do the codon to amino acid lookup?
lookup.answer: A dictionary mapping each codon (e.g. `"AUG"`) to its amino acid (e.g. `"Methionine"`) is the right shape for this. STOP codons map to `"STOP"`.

splitChunks.question: How do I split the string into chunks of 3?
splitChunks.answer: Walk through with a position counter that goes up by 3 each time. At each step, take the substring of length 3 starting at your position. That's the current codon.

stopCodon.question: What do I do when I hit a STOP codon?
stopCodon.answer: Stop translating completely. Use `break` to exit the loop. Don't add STOP to your protein list.

push.description: Returns a new list with the element added to the end (provided by level stdlib)
